parameters.subject: Application Status & Feedback - AuraRecruit
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $json.body.candidateName }},

Thank you for applying to our open position via AuraRecruit.

After reviewing your resume, we regret to inform you that we will not be moving forward with your application at this time (ATS score: {{ $json.body.atsScore }}/100).

To help you with your future applications, our AI analyzer has identified the following areas for improvement:

Weaknesses:
{{ $json.body.weaknesses.join('\n- ') }}

Recommendations:
{{ $json.body.recommendations.join('\n- ') }}

We wish you all the best in your job search.

Best regards,
The AuraRecruit HR Team
